safeText: Please review v4.6 as advisory-only and route comments to owners.
Please test fake founder/business-owner workflows only.
Please test guest-only fake workflows; official member route remains closed.
Real intake remains blocked until authority route is approved privately.
Fields, access, export, deletion, and custody remain owner-gated.
Support, withdrawal, complaint, and incident paths remain required.
Please choose provider-assisted or self-build path and confirm dependencies.
Provider access remains conditional and revocable.
The public demo now includes a controlled fake/sample pilot execution pack.
Real participant intake and live Decidim access remain blocked.
A no-go or archive outcome can be published safely if owners choose it.
Only passed fake-data tasks can move into the live Decidim build sprint.
